_comment: Model routing for War Loops. ONE control surface for which model runs each role. Swapping a model is an edit here (or a WARLOOPS_<ROLE>_MODEL env var), never a code change. The defaults reproduce the original verified behavior. See OVERVIEW.md > Swapping models. List available Pencil model ids with: pencil --list-models --agent claude

build._note: The Pencil design + repair agent. The dominant cost (about $1.5-$2/build). 'default' uses Pencil's default claude (reproduces the verified baseline). To route: set model to a Pencil model id, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'claude-sonnet-4-6' (cheaper), 'gpt-5.5', or a gemini id. Provider is inferred from the id. Optional: add "effort": "low|medium|high" to tune reasoning.

readback._note: Cheap structured read-back of the built doc (no design work). Safe to route to the cheapest capable model, e.g. 'claude-haiku-4-5'.

judge._note: The vision fidelity signal (claude CLI). 'default' uses the claude CLI default model. Pin it with an id, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-6' or 'claude-haiku-4-5'.
